overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a smooth aerial drone flight through a mountain canyon system. The journey begins at a cliff overlook with stratified rock walls and distant snow-capped peaks, descends into a river gorge, and culminates in a narrow misty slot canyon with dramatic god rays.

events.description: begins descending from cliff edge into the canyon depth
moves from open rim into the canyon interior

agents.ego_description: flying forward and descending along the stratified cliff face, revealing the canyon depth and river below

entered.detail: layered sedimentary rock face with horizontal striations and warm earth tones
dense coniferous trees lining the canyon edge
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the background
narrow river visible at the bottom of the deep gorge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high vantage view from a canyon rim, showcasing stratified rock walls and distant snow-capped mountains. The camera descends smoothly along the cliff face, revealing the depth of the gorge and a river far below, with pine forests lining the canyon edge.

events.description: levels out and begins following the canyon path at mid-altitude
approaching narrower canyon section with visible mist rising

agents.ego_description: flying along the canyon wall at mid-level, following the river's winding path through the gorge

entered.detail: calm river water reflecting the canyon walls
steep rocky wall on the right side of the gorge
jagged rock formations along the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The camera levels out and navigates through the canyon interior, flying alongside the river at mid-level. The stratified cliff wall recedes to the left while the right canyon wall comes into view, with rocky outcroppings visible along the water's edge.

events.description: enters narrow misty canyon section with dramatic change in lighting
strong god rays become visible streaming down from the opening above

agents.ego_description: flying upward through the narrow misty canyon toward the bright light opening above

entered.detail: dark shadowed rock wall in close proximity on the left
dark shadowed rock wall in close proximity on the right
atmospheric mist filling the canyon, likely from a waterfall
bright sunlight visible through the narrow opening at the top of the canyon
coniferous trees silhouetted against the bright sky at the canyon opening

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dramatically different environment—a narrow, mist-filled slot canyon with dark walls close on both sides. Flying upward toward a bright opening above, strong god rays pierce through the mist, with pine trees visible as silhouettes against the bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from a wide mountain overlook into the claustrophobic depths of a misty slot canyon. It begins at a high vantage point on a canyon rim, gliding smoothly down a stratified cliff face past pine forests toward a river far below. As the camera levels out, it navigates the interior of the gorge, flying alongside the water while the expansive rock walls shift and recede on either side. The scene then transitions into a narrow, dark slot canyon where the environment closes in, before finally ascending through thick mist toward a bright opening where dramatic god rays silhouette the surrounding pine trees.
